name: NavCard
description: Bounded single-row navigation card — an outlined rounded surface with a leading label, optional supporting line, and an auto-rendered trailing chevron. The whole card is the drill-in tap target. Reach for it when a [List/nav](../list/nav.md) row needs to read as its own discrete affordance rather than as one entry in a stack — a standalone settings entry, a picker trigger between content blocks, or a bounded-surface drill-in where the host surface already supplies the stack rhythm. Single-spec family.
wrapperGuidance: Owns its inline padding internally. Place as a direct child of the page-shell <main> (or any host that pays the gutter once). Do NOT wrap in a padding-inline div, className="px-*", or style={{ padding }} — the page rail is paid once at the shell, never on the full-bleed child. Inside a bounded surface (Dialog / BottomSheet / SideSheet), apply the negative-margin opt-out — see AGENTS.md § Composition rules.
